hintDisplay: Sujeto: el árbitro / Verbo: poder (habilidad/permiso) / Verbo: advertir / Complemento: al jugador / Complemento: por conducta antideportiva
spanishSentence: El árbitro podría advertir al jugador por conducta antideportiva.
correctSentence: The referee could warn the player for unsportsmanlike conduct.

hintDisplay: Sujeto: tú / Verbo: deber (obligación/recomendación) / Verbo: competir / Complemento: con confianza / Verbo: confiar / Complemento: en tu entrenamiento
spanishSentence: Deberías competir con confianza y confiar en tu entrenamiento.
correctSentence: You should compete with confidence and trust your training.

correctSentence: They have to compete fairly in the tournament.

correctSentence: As the captain, I could play in the final match if the coach decides to give me the opportunity.

correctSentence: You may not substitute the goalkeeper during the match unless he gets injured.

correctSentence: We should not compete without proper training.

correctSentence: The referee must penalize the player for committing a foul during the match.

correctSentence: We should not train too hard before the match.
